testsuite.name: uav_bridge.uncrustify

testcase.name: include/uav_bridge/flight_mode_manager.hpp
include/uav_bridge/frame_aligner.hpp
include/uav_bridge/gz_topic_utils.hpp
testcase.failure: --- include/uav_bridge/gz_topic_utils.hpp +++ include/uav_bridge/gz_topic_utils.hpp.uncrustify @@ -5 +5,2 @@ -namespace uav_bridge::gz_topics { +namespace uav_bridge::gz_topics +{ @@ -7 +8,2 @@ -inline std::string WorldPrefix(const std::string &gz_world_name) { +inline std::string WorldPrefix(const std::string & gz_world_name) +{ @@ -11 +13,2 @@ -inline std::string PoseInfo(const std::string &gz_world_name) { +inline std::string PoseInfo(const std::string & gz_world_name) +{ @@ -15 +18,2 @@ -inline std::string Clock(const std::string &gz_world_name) { +inline std::string Clock(const std::string & gz_world_name) +{ @@ -19,4 +23,6 @@ -inline std::string SensorPrefix(const std::string &gz_world_name, - const std::string &model_name, - const std::string &link_name, - const std::string &sensor_name) { +inline std::string SensorPrefix( + const std::string & gz_world_name, + const std::string & model_name, + const std::string & link_name, + const std::string & sensor_name) +{ @@ -27,4 +33,6 @@ -inline std::string Image(const std::string &gz_world_name, - const std::string &model_name, - const std::string &link_name, - const std::string &sensor_name) { +inline std::string Image( + const std::string & gz_world_name, + const std::string & model_name, + const std::string & link_name, + const std::string & sensor_name) +{ @@ -35,4 +43,6 @@ -inline std::string DepthImage(const std::string &gz_world_name, - const std::string &model_name, - const std::string &link_name, - const std::string &sensor_name) { +inline std::string DepthImage( + const std::string & gz_world_name, + const std::string & model_name, + const std::string & link_name, + const std::string & sensor_name) +{ @@ -43,4 +53,6 @@ -inline std::string DepthPoints(const std::string &gz_world_name, - const std::string &model_name, - const std::string &link_name, - const std::string &sensor_name) { +inline std::string DepthPoints( + const std::string & gz_world_name, + const std::string & model_name, + const std::string & link_name, + const std::string & sensor_name) +{ @@ -51,4 +63,6 @@ -inline std::string Scan(const std::string &gz_world_name, - const std::string &model_name, - const std::string &link_name, - const std::string &sensor_name) { +inline std::string Scan( + const std::string & gz_world_name, + const std::string & model_name, + const std::string & link_name, + const std::string & sensor_name) +{ @@ -59,4 +73,6 @@ -inline std::string Imu(const std::string &gz_world_name, - const std::string &model_name, - const std::string &link_name, - const std::string &sensor_name) { +inline std::string Imu( + const std::string & gz_world_name, + const std::string & model_name, + const std::string & link_name, + const std::string & sensor_name) +{

testcase.name: include/uav_bridge/math_utils.hpp
src/flight_mode_manager.cpp
src/fmu_topic_namespace_bridge_node.cpp
testcase.failure: --- src/fmu_topic_namespace_bridge_node.cpp +++ src/fmu_topic_namespace_bridge_node.cpp.uncrustify @@ -21 +21,2 @@ - FmuTopicNamespaceBridgeNode() : Node("fmu_topic_namespace_bridge") + FmuTopicNamespaceBridgeNode() + : Node("fmu_topic_namespace_bridge")

testcase.name: src/frame_aligner.cpp
src/math_utils.cpp
src/mono_camera_bridge_node.cpp
src/offboard_bridge_node.cpp
src/optical_flow_bridge_node.cpp
src/px4_odom_adapter_logic.cpp
src/px4_odom_adapter_node.cpp
testcase.failure: --- src/px4_odom_adapter_node.cpp +++ src/px4_odom_adapter_node.cpp.uncrustify @@ -199 +199,2 @@ - this->get_logger(), *this->get_clock(), 1000, + this->get_logger(), + *this->get_clock(), 1000,

testcase.name: src/px4_planar_state_reader_node.cpp
src/rangefinder_bridge_node.cpp
src/stereo_camera_bridge_node.cpp
src/tf_bridge_node.cpp
src/uav_control_node.cpp
src/uav_state_bridge_logic.cpp
src/uav_state_bridge_node.cpp
testcase.failure: --- src/uav_state_bridge_node.cpp +++ src/uav_state_bridge_node.cpp.uncrustify @@ -28 +28,3 @@ - this->declare_parameter<std::string>("vehicle_local_position_topic", "/uav/fmu/out/vehicle_local_position"); + this->declare_parameter<std::string>( + "vehicle_local_position_topic", + "/uav/fmu/out/vehicle_local_position");

testsuite.system-out: Checked files: * include/uav_bridge/flight_mode_manager.hpp * include/uav_bridge/frame_aligner.hpp * include/uav_bridge/gz_topic_utils.hpp * include/uav_bridge/math_utils.hpp * include/uav_bridge/px4_commander.hpp * include/uav_bridge/px4_odom_adapter_logic.hpp * include/uav_bridge/uav_control_logic.hpp * include/uav_bridge/uav_state_bridge_logic.hpp * src/flight_mode_manager.cpp * src/fmu_topic_namespace_bridge_node.cpp * src/frame_aligner.cpp * src/math_utils.cpp * src/mono_camera_bridge_node.cpp * src/offboard_bridge_node.cpp * src/optical_flow_bridge_node.cpp * src/px4_commander.cpp * src/px4_odom_adapter_logic.cpp * src/px4_odom_adapter_node.cpp * src/px4_planar_state_reader_node.cpp * src/rangefinder_bridge_node.cpp * src/stereo_camera_bridge_node.cpp * src/tf_bridge_node.cpp * src/uav_control_node.cpp * src/uav_state_bridge_logic.cpp * src/uav_state_bridge_node.cpp * test/test_px4_odom_adapter_logic.cpp * test/test_uav_control_logic.cpp * test/test_uav_state_bridge_logic.cpp
